'''A'roFilter''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company operating primarily on [[Gas giant/Legends|gas planets]] including [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. The company had ties to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], with [[Willrow Hood/Legends|Willrow Hood]] overseeing secret supply of discounted [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] from [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] hands.

==Behind the scenes==
A'roFilter was introduced by [[Captain Yossarian|Benjamin Christopher Norton Dawe]] in his [[Willrow Hood/Legends|Willrow Hood]] ''[[What's The Story?]]'' entry. He had originally called the company '''AëroFilter''', though the name was changed in editing.<ref name="Blog-Yossarian|2">{{Blog|Yossarian|2|The Story of Willrow Hood, Or: Now You Know What That Big White Thing Is.}}</ref>
